query: SELECT id, name, email, role FROM users WHERE role IN ('super_admin', 'admin', 'comercial', 'disenador', 'jefe_taller', 'operario') AND email NOT IN ('mcfy8jgnym@privaterelay.appleid.com', 'alejoile300@gmail.com', 'martha79s@hotmail.com', 'jefe.taller@innovar.temp', 'operario@innovar.temp') ORDER BY role, name LIMIT 30;
